title: hieracium murorum subsp. subpersimile
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subpersimile is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a flowering perennial with yellow or orange flowers and leaves that are often used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. subpersimile include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infection, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Hieracium murorum subsp. subpersimile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
